title: What I think about countries playlist mission statement.

transcript.text: Hello, this is what I think about countries mission statement. I think it's cool to talk trash about people. I guess it's the vernacular. Talk about people in an honest way. That's interesting. I did a video a little bit ago.

I'd love to hear people say other countries say what they think about America like in like

You know really think about America not like you know like French people we hate America because America is imperialist and America is this and that kind of like consensus type of thing but like somebody who's actually been to America and what they think about America and then with examples and stuff of people they met or whatever and that'd be cool that'd be really interesting so I think I'm going to go ahead and critique all the countries I've been to and it's cool if you hear
